descriptionEn: Peter Waldo is the commonly accepted founder of the Waldensian church.
articleEn: Different sources attribute the establishment of the Waldensian movement to various people and historical periods, but the Waldenses themselves credit Peter Waldo. Waldo's street preaching began in Lyon in the year 1177A.D.

images.caption: Statue of Peter Waldo at the Luther Memorial at Worms, Germany
